hero.subtitle: Welcome to
hero.title: Quaid-e-Millat Public School Ameerabad
hero.description: Nurturing Young Minds, Building Futures Since 1999, where excellence in education meets character building. We provide quality education from Playgroup to Grade 7 in a nurturing environment.

sections.heading: Our History
sections.content: Quaid-e-Millat Public School Ameerabad was established in 1999 with a profound vision to provide quality education and foster a generation of leaders.

sections.heading: Our Founder
sections.content: The foundation of this esteemed institution was laid by one of the community's most honored teachers, Malik M. Abdullah Hadi.

sections.heading: Our Mission
sections.content: We strive to provide quality education while developing strong moral values, leadership skills, and a sense of responsibility among students.

sections.heading: Our Vision
sections.content: To be a leading educational institution that nurtures young minds and prepares them for the challenges of the future.

sections.heading: Our Values
sections.content: We uphold values of integrity, respect, and excellence in all our endeavors.

sections.heading: Our Achievements
sections.content: Over the years, our students have excelled in academics, sports, and extracurricular activities, bringing pride to our school.

sections.heading: Our Community
sections.content: We foster a strong sense of community among students, parents, and staff, creating a supportive and inclusive environment.

sections.heading: Our Motive
sections.content: Our motive is to develop the unique abilities and potential of each child by offering an enriched educational program. We strive for excellence through a hands-on approach. Rich traditions rooted in our innovative curriculum grow productive, caring, and intellectually curious citizens.

principal.name: Malik Gulzar Hussain — Principal QMPS
principal.message: We aim at inspiring our students to dream more, learn more, do more, and become more in their respective journeys of life.

contact.title: Stay Connected with us
contact.description: Wish to enquire about admissions, syllabus, or anything else? You can walk in during office hours, give us a call or simply submit the form here.
contact.address: Near Cricket Stadium Ameerabad (Kowas), Chorbat Ghanche, Gilgi Baltistan , Pakistan.

notices.title: Admissions Open
notices.description: Admissions are open for classes 1 through 10.
